user.title: Attach to WLED
user.description: Select an existing WLED device from the stock integration. WLED Studio adds layout, scenes, paint, and Studio UI without replacing WLED.

abort.already_configured: Already configured for this WLED device
abort.no_wled: No WLED integrations found. Add the stock WLED integration first.

error.wled_not_found: The selected WLED integration was removed
